01 / GENESIS

A New Dimension

Scroll down to initiate the transformation. Witness the flawless synchronization of code, canvas, and high-performance physics-based kinetics.

02 / KINETICS

Mathematical Harmony

Driven by custom aspect ratio vector calculations mimicking CSS cover behavior. Designed with sub-pixel rounding to achieve pure optical clarity.

03 / ABSOLUTE

The Core Revealed

Optimized backing store allocations detect device pixel ratios dynamically, driving high-DPI crispness to its absolute hardware limit.
